entry.title: New: BILL062(24) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO MOTOR VEHICLE REGISTRATION.

Provides an exemption from the county motor vehicle registration fee for one vehicle for veterans 65 years of age or older who were not dishonorably discharged from the United States armed forces, effective July 1, 2026.

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
